content: I'm currently trying to use @Danilo Krummrich s Io abstraction with port memory, using ioport_map as this also returns a type anotated as iomem. But when using the Io abstractions writeb call I get a pagefault, is this just incompatible api? I see another driver using iowrite8 and others that don't use the ioport_map call just using outb. Should this use be some fully seperate abstraction or am I not seeing something
